message:
feat(core): add wchar support and expand time, stdlib, string, unistd implementations

Introduced wide character string functions (wchar.rs) in frankenlibc-core
for wchar_t-based string operations. Updated time ABI definitions and the
core time module for improved POSIX time function coverage. Enhanced
stdlib with conversion and random function refinements. Updated the
string module and unistd implementations. Expanded the libc version
script symbol map to export newly implemented functions. Support matrix
updated to reflect the broadened function coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
